name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-hyperdisplay-ug2856klbag01
author: SparkFun
description: WiseChip UG2856KLBAG01 透明 OLED Blockly 库，支持 I2C/SPI 初始化、单色绘图、文本、对比度、反相和电源控制。

description_en: Blockly wrapper for WiseChip UG2856KLBAG01 transparent OLED display.
